config.script:
#include "h1000.h" #include "h1200.h" #include "50203"
class wtprocessor private m_oWordApp private m_oWordDoc private m_pRoot private m_strBuffer private m_strLastError
private sub class_initialize() set m_oWordApp = nothing set m_oWordDoc = nothing set m_pRoot = nothing m_strBuffer = "" m_strLastError = "" end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_oWordDoc = nothing set m_oWordApp = nothing set m_pRoot = nothing end sub
'------ [from] Application Interface --------- public sub init_w_object(byref oWordApp,byref oWordDoc,byref pRoot) set m_oWordApp = oWordApp set m_oWordDoc = oWordDoc set m_pRoot = pRoot end sub
public sub go ExecuteGlobal "dim gen : set gen = nothing" ExecuteGlobal "dim root : set root = nothing" ExecuteGlobal "dim word : set word = nothing" dim oRangeDoc : set oRangeDoc = m_oWordDoc.Range on error resume next process_range oRangeDoc if err.Number then m_strLastError = "Wystąpił błąd skryptu " + cstr(err.Number) + ", opis:" + err.Description end if on error goto 0 end sub
public function lasterror lasterror = m_strLastError end function
'------ internals --------- public sub process_range(byval oPartRange) dim oRange : set oRange = oPartRange.Duplicate do while find_vbcode(oRange) 'retrieve dim strVBCode : strVBCode = mid(oRange.Text,3,len(oRange.Text) - 4) 'clean in Word oRange.Text = "" 'process process_vbcode strVBCode 'replace with results oRange.Text = m_strBuffer 'clean m_strBuffer = "" 'prepare next find oRange.Start = oRange.End + 1 oRange.End = oPartRange.End loop end sub
private sub process_vbcode(byref strVBCode) strVBCode = ltrim(strVBCode)
'detect and convert simple write directive if left(strVBCode,1) = "=" then strVBCode = "gen.write " + mid(strVBCode,2) end if
'trans_.message 7000, 0, "[" + strVBCode + "]"
'execute phrase set gen = me set root = m_pRoot set word = m_oWordDoc ExecuteGlobal strVBCode end sub
private function findrow_with_marker(byval strMarker) : set findrow_with_marker = nothing dim tbliter for tbliter = 1 to m_oWordDoc.Tables.Count with m_oWordDoc.Tables(tbliter) dim rowiter for rowiter = 1 to .Rows.Count dim oRow set oRow = .Rows(rowiter) if instr(1,oRow.Range.Text,strMarker, vbTextCompare) > 0 then set findrow_with_marker = oRow exit function end if next end with next end function
'------ [from] Word Interface --------- public sub write(byval strValue) m_strBuffer = m_strBuffer + strValue end sub
public function copyrow(byval strMarker) : set copyrow = nothing dim oRow : set oRow = findrow_with_marker(strMarker) if oRow is nothing then trans_.message 7000, 0, "row with marker " + strMarker + " not found" exit function end if
'copy found row to clipboard oRow.Select m_oWordDoc.ActiveWindow.Selection.Copy
'set selection to end of table and paste dim oTable : set oTable = oRow.Parent with m_oWordDoc.ActiveWindow.Selection .End = oTable.Range.End .Start = oTable.Range.End .Paste end with set copyrow = oTable.Rows.Last.Range end function
public sub deleterow(byval strMarker) dim oRow : set oRow = findrow_with_marker(strMarker) if oRow is nothing then trans_.message 7000, 0, "row with marker " + strMarker + " not found" exit sub end if oRow.Delete end sub
public sub callsub(byref oRange) if oRange is nothing then exit sub end if
dim oWPT : set oWPT = new wtprocessor oWPT.init_w_object m_oWordApp,m_oWordDoc,m_pRoot oWPT.process_range oRange end sub '---------- shortcuts ----------- public function firma() set firma = getCurrentFirma() end function
public function uzytkownik() set uzytkownik = getCurrentUser() end function public function dzisiaj() dzisiaj = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) end function public function data(byval dDate) data = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(cdate(dDate)) end function public function kwota(byval curKwota) kwota = trans_.afc.display.money(ccur(curKwota),"PLN") end function public function ilosc(byval curKwota,byref pJedn) ilosc = trans_.afc.display.quantity(ccur(curKwota),pJedn.strSkrot,pJedn.nDokladnosc) end function public function slownie(byval curKwota) slownie = trans_.afc.display.slownie(ccur(curKwota)) end function public property get util_ set util_ = doc_.getmodule(60182) end property end class
'-- szuka fragmentu <% %> i jeśli znajdzie '-- modyfikuje oRange oraz zwraca true function find_vbcode(byref oRange) oRange.Find.ClearFormatting With oRange.Find .Text = "\<%*%\>" .Replacement.Text = "" .Forward = True .Wrap = 0 'wdFindStop = 0 .Format = False .MatchCase = False .MatchWholeWord = False .MatchAllWordForms = False .MatchSoundsLike = False .MatchWildcards = True End With find_vbcode = oRange.Find.Execute end function
function wtp_object(byref pInStream,byval strOutFileName,byref pRoot) dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa tworzenie dokumentu ") dim strNewDokPath if strOutFileName = "" then strNewDokPath = doc_.system.createtempfilename("wpt", "doc" ) else strNewDokPath = strOutFileName end if pInStream.copyto strNewDokPath
dim oWordApp : set oWordApp = nothing
'--try create object on error resume next set oWordApp = doc_.system.activex("Word.Application") on error goto 0
if oWordApp is nothing then '-- exit when failed wtp_object = "" exit function end if
dim oWordDoc : set oWordDoc = oWordApp.Documents.Open(strNewDokPath) oWordDoc.Activate
dim oWPT : set oWPT = new wtprocessor oWPT.init_w_object oWordApp,oWordDoc,pRoot
oWPT.go if oWPT.lasterror() = "" then wtp_object = strNewDokPath else trans_.message 0,0,oWPT.lasterror() wtp_object = "" end if
'zapisujemy oWordDoc.Save 'czyścimy set oWPT = nothing oWordDoc.Close oWordApp.Quit end function
